The effects of catalyst dosage, the ratio of benzene to olefin, reaction temperature and reaction time on the yield of alky -benzene and the quality of alky late were investigated.
Synthesis, property and application of acrylic modified alky resin are reviewed. Advantages and disadvantages of modified resin are discussed and the possible trend of this resin is pointed out.
